capabilities.name: Text Summarization
capabilities.description: Summarizes long pieces of text into concise summaries.
capabilities.usage: For condensing articles, papers, or lengthy emails into shorter versions.
capabilities.constraints: Summarizations may lose some details; context can affect quality.
capabilities.example_prompt: Can you summarize the main points of this article about climate change?

capabilities.name: Text Generation
capabilities.description: Generates coherent and contextually relevant text based on a given prompt.
capabilities.usage: Useful for creative writing, generating ideas, or producing content.
capabilities.constraints: Generated text may not always be factually accurate; creativity can lead to ambiguous results.
capabilities.example_prompt: Write a short story about a dragon who loves to cook.

capabilities.name: Language Translation
capabilities.description: Translates text from one language to another.
capabilities.constraints: Idiomatic expressions may not always translate well; context is key.
capabilities.example_prompt: Translate the following sentence into French: 'I am excited to learn new languages.'

capabilities.name: Question Answering
capabilities.description: Answers questions based on provided context or general knowledge.
capabilities.usage: For retrieving specific information quickly or clarifying doubts.
capabilities.constraints: Accuracy depends on the clarity of the question and available knowledge.
capabilities.example_prompt: What are the main causes of World War II?

capabilities.name: Text Classification
capabilities.description: Classifies text into predefined categories or labels.
capabilities.usage: Used for sorting emails, tagging documents, or identifying topics.
capabilities.constraints: Categories must be well-defined; performance can vary based on text complexity.
capabilities.example_prompt: Classify this email as 'urgent', 'normal', or 'spam': 'The meeting has been postponed.'

capabilities.name: Sentiment Analysis
capabilities.description: Determines the sentiment expressed in a piece of text.
capabilities.usage: Used in customer feedback analysis, social media monitoring, etc.
capabilities.constraints: Sarcasm or nuanced expressions can lead to misinterpretation.
capabilities.example_prompt: What is the sentiment of this tweet: 'I love my new job, but the commute is a nightmare!'

capabilities.name: Text Paraphrasing
capabilities.description: Rephrases text while maintaining the original meaning.
capabilities.usage: Useful for rewording, avoiding plagiarism, or simplifying complex text.
capabilities.constraints: The paraphrase may alter nuances and intentions; original context should be preserved.
capabilities.example_prompt: Can you paraphrase this sentence: 'The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.'

capabilities.name: Conversational Agent
capabilities.description: Engages in human-like conversations to assist with queries or provide information.
capabilities.usage: Helpful for customer support, casual conversation, or interactive learning.
capabilities.constraints: Responses may be limited to the scope of programmed knowledge; may require clarification.
capabilities.example_prompt: Let's chat about travel destinations. What are some popular places to visit in Europe?

capabilities.name: Text Completion
capabilities.description: Completes a text prompt by predicting the next words or sentences.
capabilities.usage: Used for drafting emails, writing assistance, or creative projects.
capabilities.constraints: Completeness and coherence heavily depend on the given prompt.
capabilities.example_prompt: The future of renewable energy is bright because

tools.name: Text Summarizer
tools.description: Summarizes long pieces of text into concise summaries.
tools.usage: To extract key points from an article or a report.
tools.example_prompt: Can you summarize this article on climate change into a few main points?

tools.name: Image Caption Generator
tools.usage: To provide context or descriptions for the provided images.
tools.constraints: Images must be in JPG or PNG format.
tools.example_prompt: Please attach an image and I'll generate a caption for it.

tools.name: Speech-to-Text Converter
tools.description: Transcribes spoken language into written text.
tools.usage: To create a written record of spoken content.
tools.constraints: Audio files should be under 5 minutes in duration.
tools.example_prompt: Please provide your audio file so I can transcribe it.

tools.name: Language Translator
tools.description: Translates text from one language to another.
tools.usage: To convert phrases or documents into different languages.

tools.name: Sentiment Analysis Tool
tools.description: Analyzes text to determine the sentiment expressed.
tools.usage: To gauge the emotional tone behind a body of text.
tools.example_prompt: What is the sentiment of this review: 'The product is excellent and works beautifully.'?
